actions.plan: I should head to the hallway to check if there are any announcements or updates from the student council. It's important to stay informed and be proactive.

actions.dialog_text: Zoe, let's stay together and follow the others!
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot! I need to stay calm and follow the crowd to safety. I see Zoe Patel nearby, maybe we can stick together.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, let’s head to the far_right_yard together! Stay close!
actions.plan: The shooter is in the cafeteria, which is east of here. I need to follow the crowd to the far_right_yard to get away from the danger. I see Jason, Jacob, David, and Isabella nearby—we should all stick together.

memories.description: Decided to go to hallway2 to check for any student council announcements or updates.
Heard a gunshot and decided to follow the crowd towards the far_right_yard for safety, sticking with Zoe Patel.
Learned the shooter is in the cafeteria and decided to follow the crowd to the far_right_yard, encouraging Jason, Jacob, David, and Isabella to stay together.
